title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the African Development Fund Act, 1982. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 25th August, 1986, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1035(E), dated 25th August, 1986, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
